---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Raafa Agna Rasyada"
date: "2025-10-29"
output: html_document
---

1. Analisis CFA, EFA, dan SEM
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(lavaan)
library(dplyr)

data_path <- "C:/Uner/Semester 5/Multivariat/Coolyeah/Tugas Kelompok 3/Wellbeing_and_lifestyle_data_Kaggle.csv"
df <- readr::read_csv(data_path)

vars <- c(
  'FRUITS_VEGGIES','DAILY_STEPS','SLEEP_HOURS',
  'CORE_CIRCLE','SOCIAL_NETWORK','PLACES_VISITED',  
  'DAILY_STRESS','FLOW','WEEKLY_MEDITATION',
  'WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE','ACHIEVEMENT','TODO_COMPLETED'
)

df_sub <- df %>% select(all_of(vars))

for(v in names(df_sub)){
  if(is.character(df_sub[[v]]) | is.factor(df_sub[[v]])){
    df_sub[[v]] <- as.numeric(as.factor(df_sub[[v]]))
  }
}

df_imputed <- df_sub
for(v in names(df_imputed)){
  if(any(is.na(df_imputed[[v]]))){
    df_imputed[[v]][is.na(df_imputed[[v]])] <- mean(df_imputed[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

df_scaled <- as.data.frame(scale(df_imputed))

model_final <- '
  kesehatan_fisik =~ FRUITS_VEGGIES + DAILY_STEPS + SLEEP_HOURS
  koneksi_sosial =~ CORE_CIRCLE + SOCIAL_NETWORK + PLACES_VISITED  
  kesehatan_mental =~ DAILY_STRESS + FLOW + WEEKLY_MEDITATION
  work_life_balance =~ WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE + ACHIEVEMENT + TODO_COMPLETED
  
  work_life_balance ~ kesehatan_fisik + koneksi_sosial + kesehatan_mental
  
  FRUITS_VEGGIES ~~ DAILY_STEPS
  CORE_CIRCLE ~~ SOCIAL_NETWORK
  DAILY_STRESS ~~ FLOW
  ACHIEVEMENT ~~ TODO_COMPLETED
'

fit_final <- lavaan::sem(
  model_final, 
  data = df_scaled, 
  estimator = 'ML',
  control = list(iter.max = 1000)
)

cat("===========================================\n")
cat("         HASIL ANALISIS SEM LENGKAP        \n")
cat("===========================================\n\n")

if(lavInspect(fit_final, "converged")){
  cat("✓ MODEL BERHASIL KONVERGEN\n\n")
  cat("1. GOODNESS OF FIT:\n")
  cat("-------------------\n")
  fit_measures <- fitMeasures(fit_final, c('chisq','df','pvalue','cfi','tli','rmsea','srmr'))
  print(fit_measures)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI:\n")
  cat("CFI    :", round(fit_measures['cfi'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['cfi'] > 0.90, "✓ Excellent", "✗ Poor"), "\n")
  cat("TLI    :", round(fit_measures['tli'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['tli'] > 0.90, "✓ Excellent", ifelse(fit_measures['tli'] > 0.85, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor")), "\n")
  cat("RMSEA  :", round(fit_measures['rmsea'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['rmsea'] < 0.08, "✓ Good", ifelse(fit_measures['rmsea'] < 0.10, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor")), "\n")
  cat("SRMR   :", round(fit_measures['srmr'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['srmr'] < 0.08, "✓ Excellent", "✗ Poor"), "\n\n")
  
  cat("2. MEASUREMENT MODEL - LOADING FACTOR:\n")
  cat("--------------------------------------\n")
  loadings <- parameterEstimates(fit_final, standardized = TRUE) %>% 
    filter(op == "=~") %>%
    select(Construct = lhs, Indicator = rhs, Estimate = est, 
           Std.Loading = std.all, p.value = pvalue) %>%
    arrange(Construct, desc(Std.Loading))
  
  print(loadings, digits = 3)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI LOADING:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(loadings)){
    loading_val <- loadings$Std.Loading[i]
    status <- ifelse(loading_val > 0.7, "✓ Excellent", 
                    ifelse(loading_val > 0.5, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor"))
    cat(sprintf("%-20s: %.3f %s\n", 
                loadings$Indicator[i], loading_val, status))
  }
  cat("\n")
  
  cat("3. STRUCTURAL MODEL - PATH COEFFICIENTS:\n")
  cat("----------------------------------------\n")
  paths <- parameterEstimates(fit_final, standardized = TRUE) %>% 
    filter(op == "~") %>%
    select(Dependent = lhs, Independent = rhs, 
           Coefficient = est, Std.Coefficient = std.all, 
           p.value = pvalue)
  
  print(paths, digits = 3)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI PATH:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(paths)){
    coef <- paths$Std.Coefficient[i]
    sig <- ifelse(paths$p.value[i] < 0.05, "✓ Significant", "✗ Not Significant")
    direction <- ifelse(coef > 0, "Positive", "Negative")
    cat(sprintf("%s -> %s: %.3f (%s, %s)\n", 
                paths$Independent[i], paths$Dependent[i], 
                coef, direction, sig))
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("4. R-SQUARED (Variance Explained):\n")
  cat("----------------------------------\n")
  r2_values <- inspect(fit_final, 'r2')
  r2_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(r2_values),
    R_Squared = round(r2_values, 3)
  )
  print(r2_df, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI R-SQUARED:\n")
  wlb_r2 <- r2_values['work_life_balance']
  cat(sprintf("Work-Life Balance variance explained: %.1f%%\n", wlb_r2 * 100))
  cat(ifelse(wlb_r2 > 0.25, "✓ Substantial", 
             ifelse(wlb_r2 > 0.10, "✓ Moderate", "✗ Weak")), "\n\n")
  
  cat("5. MODEL SUMMARY:\n")
  cat("------------------\n")
  cat("Konstruk Exogenous:\n")
  cat("- Kesehatan Fisik: Makan buah/sayur, Langkah harian, Tidur\n")
  cat("- Koneksi Sosial: Lingkaran sosial, Jaringan sosial, Tempat dikunjungi\n")
  cat("- Kesehatan Mental: Stres harian, Flow, Meditasi mingguan\n\n")
  
  cat("Konstruk Endogenous:\n")
  cat("- Work-Life Balance: Skor keseimbangan, Pencapaian, Tugas diselesaikan\n\n")
  
  cat("Hubungan Struktural:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(paths)){
    if(paths$p.value[i] < 0.05){
      effect <- ifelse(abs(paths$Std.Coefficient[i]) > 0.3, "Strong",
                      ifelse(abs(paths$Std.Coefficient[i]) > 0.1, "Moderate", "Weak"))
      cat(sprintf("- %s memiliki pengaruh %s %s terhadap Work-Life Balance\n",
                 paths$Independent[i], effect, 
                 ifelse(paths$Std.Coefficient[i] > 0, "positif", "negatif")))
    }
  }
  saveRDS(fit_final, file = 'sem_complete_result.rds')
  cat("\n✓ Hasil lengkap disimpan sebagai 'sem_complete_result.rds'\n")
  
} else {
  cat("✗ Model gagal konvergen\n")
}

cat("\n===========================================\n")
cat("             ANALISIS SELESAI              \n")
cat("===========================================\n")
```

2. Uji Reliabilitas dan Konvergenitas
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(lavaan)
library(dplyr)

data_path <- "C:/Uner/Semester 5/Multivariat/Coolyeah/Tugas Kelompok 3/Wellbeing_and_lifestyle_data_Kaggle.csv"
df <- readr::read_csv(data_path)

vars <- c(
  'FRUITS_VEGGIES','DAILY_STEPS','SLEEP_HOURS',
  'CORE_CIRCLE','SOCIAL_NETWORK','PLACES_VISITED',  
  'DAILY_STRESS','FLOW','WEEKLY_MEDITATION',
  'WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE','ACHIEVEMENT','TODO_COMPLETED'
)

df_sub <- df %>% select(all_of(vars))

for(v in names(df_sub)){
  if(is.character(df_sub[[v]]) | is.factor(df_sub[[v]])){
    df_sub[[v]] <- as.numeric(as.factor(df_sub[[v]]))
  }
}

df_imputed <- df_sub
for(v in names(df_imputed)){
  if(any(is.na(df_imputed[[v]]))){
    df_imputed[[v]][is.na(df_imputed[[v]])] <- mean(df_imputed[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

df_scaled <- as.data.frame(scale(df_imputed))

model_final <- '
  kesehatan_fisik =~ FRUITS_VEGGIES + DAILY_STEPS + SLEEP_HOURS
  koneksi_sosial =~ CORE_CIRCLE + SOCIAL_NETWORK + PLACES_VISITED  
  kesehatan_mental =~ DAILY_STRESS + FLOW + WEEKLY_MEDITATION
  work_life_balance =~ WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE + ACHIEVEMENT + TODO_COMPLETED
  
  work_life_balance ~ kesehatan_fisik + koneksi_sosial + kesehatan_mental
  
  FRUITS_VEGGIES ~~ DAILY_STEPS
  CORE_CIRCLE ~~ SOCIAL_NETWORK
  DAILY_STRESS ~~ FLOW
  ACHIEVEMENT ~~ TODO_COMPLETED
'
fit_final <- lavaan::sem(
  model_final, 
  data = df_scaled, 
  estimator = 'ML',
  control = list(iter.max = 1000)
)

cat("===========================================\n")
cat("         HASIL ANALISIS SEM LENGKAP        \n")
cat("===========================================\n\n")

if(lavInspect(fit_final, "converged")){
  cat("✓ MODEL BERHASIL KONVERGEN\n\n")
  
  cat("1. GOODNESS OF FIT:\n")
  cat("-------------------\n")
  fit_measures <- fitMeasures(fit_final, c('chisq','df','pvalue','cfi','tli','rmsea','srmr'))
  print(fit_measures)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI:\n")
  cat("CFI    :", round(fit_measures['cfi'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['cfi'] > 0.90, "✓ Excellent", "✗ Poor"), "\n")
  cat("TLI    :", round(fit_measures['tli'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['tli'] > 0.90, "✓ Excellent", ifelse(fit_measures['tli'] > 0.85, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor")), "\n")
  cat("RMSEA  :", round(fit_measures['rmsea'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['rmsea'] < 0.08, "✓ Good", ifelse(fit_measures['rmsea'] < 0.10, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor")), "\n")
  cat("SRMR   :", round(fit_measures['srmr'], 3), ifelse(fit_measures['srmr'] < 0.08, "✓ Excellent", "✗ Poor"), "\n\n")
  
  cat("2. MEASUREMENT MODEL - LOADING FACTOR:\n")
  cat("--------------------------------------\n")
  loadings <- parameterEstimates(fit_final, standardized = TRUE) %>% 
    filter(op == "=~") %>%
    select(Construct = lhs, Indicator = rhs, Estimate = est, 
           Std.Loading = std.all, p.value = pvalue) %>%
    arrange(Construct, desc(Std.Loading))
  
  print(loadings, digits = 3)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI LOADING:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(loadings)){
    loading_val <- loadings$Std.Loading[i]
    status <- ifelse(loading_val > 0.7, "✓ Excellent", 
                    ifelse(loading_val > 0.5, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor"))
    cat(sprintf("%-20s: %.3f %s\n", 
                loadings$Indicator[i], loading_val, status))
  }
  cat("\n")
  
  cat("3. STRUCTURAL MODEL - PATH COEFFICIENTS:\n")
  cat("----------------------------------------\n")
  paths <- parameterEstimates(fit_final, standardized = TRUE) %>% 
    filter(op == "~") %>%
    select(Dependent = lhs, Independent = rhs, 
           Coefficient = est, Std.Coefficient = std.all, 
           p.value = pvalue)
  
  print(paths, digits = 3)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI PATH:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(paths)){
    coef <- paths$Std.Coefficient[i]
    sig <- ifelse(paths$p.value[i] < 0.05, "✓ Significant", "✗ Not Significant")
    direction <- ifelse(coef > 0, "Positive", "Negative")
    cat(sprintf("%s -> %s: %.3f (%s, %s)\n", 
                paths$Independent[i], paths$Dependent[i], 
                coef, direction, sig))
  }
  cat("\n")
  
  cat("4. R-SQUARED (Variance Explained):\n")
  cat("----------------------------------\n")
  r2_values <- inspect(fit_final, 'r2')
  r2_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(r2_values),
    R_Squared = round(r2_values, 3)
  )
  print(r2_df, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("\nINTERPRETASI R-SQUARED:\n")
  wlb_r2 <- r2_values['work_life_balance']
  cat(sprintf("Work-Life Balance variance explained: %.1f%%\n", wlb_r2 * 100))
  cat(ifelse(wlb_r2 > 0.25, "✓ Substantial", 
             ifelse(wlb_r2 > 0.10, "✓ Moderate", "✗ Weak")), "\n\n")
  
  cat("5. MODEL SUMMARY:\n")
  cat("------------------\n")
  cat("Konstruk Exogenous:\n")
  cat("- Kesehatan Fisik: Makan buah/sayur, Langkah harian, Tidur\n")
  cat("- Koneksi Sosial: Lingkaran sosial, Jaringan sosial, Tempat dikunjungi\n")
  cat("- Kesehatan Mental: Stres harian, Flow, Meditasi mingguan\n\n")
  
  cat("Konstruk Endogenous:\n")
  cat("- Work-Life Balance: Skor keseimbangan, Pencapaian, Tugas diselesaikan\n\n")
  
  cat("Hubungan Struktural:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(paths)){
    if(paths$p.value[i] < 0.05){
      effect <- ifelse(abs(paths$Std.Coefficient[i]) > 0.3, "Strong",
                      ifelse(abs(paths$Std.Coefficient[i]) > 0.1, "Moderate", "Weak"))
      cat(sprintf("- %s memiliki pengaruh %s %s terhadap Work-Life Balance\n",
                 paths$Independent[i], effect, 
                 ifelse(paths$Std.Coefficient[i] > 0, "positif", "negatif")))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
  cat("6. RELIABILITY AND VALIDITY (CR and AVE):\n")
  cat("-----------------------------------------\n")
  std_loadings <- loadings %>%
    mutate(lambda_sq = Std.Loading^2,
           theta = 1 - lambda_sq) 
  reliability_stats <- std_loadings %>%
    group_by(Construct) %>%
    summarise(
      sum_lambda = sum(Std.Loading),
      sum_lambda_sq = sum(lambda_sq),
      sum_theta = sum(theta),
      n_indicators = n()
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      CR = (sum_lambda^2) / (sum_lambda^2 + sum_theta),
      AVE = sum_lambda_sq / n_indicators
    ) %>%
    select(Construct, CR, AVE)
  print(reliability_stats, digits = 3)

  cat("\nINTERPRETASI RELIABILITAS & VALIDITAS KONVERGEN:\n")
  cat("Rule of thumb: CR > 0.7 (Reliabel), AVE > 0.5 (Valid)\n\n")
  
  for(i in 1:nrow(reliability_stats)){
    construct_name <- reliability_stats$Construct[i]
    cr_val <- reliability_stats$CR[i]
    ave_val <- reliability_stats$AVE[i]
    
    cr_status <- ifelse(cr_val > 0.7, "✓ Reliabel", 
                       ifelse(cr_val > 0.6, "✓ Acceptable", "✗ Poor"))
    ave_status <- ifelse(ave_val > 0.5, "✓ Valid", "✗ Invalid (Convergent Validity Issue)")
    
    cat(sprintf("Konstruk: %s\n", construct_name))
    cat(sprintf("  - Composite Reliability (CR): %.3f (%s)\n", cr_val, cr_status))
    cat(sprintf("  - Average Variance Extracted (AVE): %.3f (%s)\n", ave_val, ave_status))
  }
  cat("\n")

  saveRDS(fit_final, file = 'sem_complete_result.rds')
  cat("\n✓ Hasil lengkap disimpan sebagai 'sem_complete_result.rds'\n")
  
} else {
  cat("✗ Model gagal konvergen\n")
}

cat("\n===========================================\n")
cat("             ANALISIS SELESAI              \n")
cat("===========================================\n")
}}
```

3. Visualisasi CFA Path
```{r}
library(DiagrammeR)
grViz("
  digraph SEM {
    graph [layout = dot, rankdir = LR, splines=true, bgcolor=transparent]

    # Konstruk laten Eksogen (ξ₁, ξ₂, ξ₃)
    node [shape=ellipse, style=filled, fontcolor=white, fontsize=13]
    kesehatan_fisik [label='Kesehatan Fisik (ξ₁)', fillcolor='#1E88E5'];
    relasi_sosial [label='Relasi Sosial (ξ₂)', fillcolor='#8E24AA'];
    kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='Kesejahteraan Psikologis (ξ₃)', fillcolor='#FB8C00'];

    # Konstruk laten Endogen (η₁)
    node [shape=ellipse, style=filled, fontcolor=white, fontsize=13]
    kesejahteraan_umum [label='Kesejahteraan Umum (η₁)', fillcolor='#43A047'];

    # Indikator (variabel manifest)
    node [shape=box, style=rounded, fillcolor=white, fontcolor=black, fontsize=10]
    FRUITS_VEGGIES; DAILY_STEPS; BMI_RANGE; SLEEP_HOURS; LOST_VACATION;
    CORE_CIRCLE; SUPPORTING_OTHERS; SOCIAL_NETWORK; PLACES_VISITED; DONATION;
    DAILY_STRESS; FLOW; LIVE_VISION; TIME_FOR_PASSION; WEEKLY_MEDITATION;
    WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE; ACHIEVEMENT; TODO_COMPLETED; SUFFICIENT_INCOME; PERSONAL_AWARDS;

    # Loading indikator -> konstruk eksogen
    FRUITS_VEGGIES -> kesehatan_fisik [label='λ=0.650'];
    DAILY_STEPS -> kesehatan_fisik [label='λ=0.895'];
    BMI_RANGE -> kesehatan_fisik [label='λ=0.849'];
    SLEEP_HOURS -> kesehatan_fisik [label='λ=0.874'];
    LOST_VACATION -> kesehatan_fisik [label='λ=0.819'];

    CORE_CIRCLE -> relasi_sosial [label='λ=0.734'];
    SUPPORTING_OTHERS -> relasi_sosial [label='λ=0.795'];
    SOCIAL_NETWORK -> relasi_sosial [label='λ=0.858'];
    PLACES_VISITED -> relasi_sosial [label='λ=0.838'];
    DONATION -> relasi_sosial [label='λ=0.625'];

    DAILY_STRESS -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='λ=0.928'];
    FLOW -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='λ=0.863'];
    LIVE_VISION -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='λ=0.874'];
    TIME_FOR_PASSION -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='λ=0.874'];
    WEEKLY_MEDITATION -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [label='λ=0.906'];

    # Loading indikator -> konstruk endogen
    WORK_LIFE_BALANCE_SCORE -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='λ=0.985'];
    ACHIEVEMENT -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='λ=0.996'];
    TODO_COMPLETED -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='λ=0.990'];
    SUFFICIENT_INCOME -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='λ=0.995'];
    PERSONAL_AWARDS -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='λ=0.763'];

    # Hubungan antar konstruk (β)
    kesehatan_fisik -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='β=0.068', color='#1E88E5', penwidth=2];
    relasi_sosial -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='β=0.04', color='#8E24AA', penwidth=2];
    kesejahteraan_psikologis -> kesejahteraan_umum [label='β=-0.066', color='#FB8C00', penwidth=2];

    # Kovarian antar eksogen (r)
    kesehatan_fisik -> relasi_sosial [dir=both, color=gray60, style=dashed, label='r=0.155'];
    kesehatan_fisik -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [dir=both, color=gray60, style=dashed, label='r=0.463'];
    relasi_sosial -> kesejahteraan_psikologis [dir=both, color=gray60, style=dashed, label='r=0.139'];

    { rank = same; kesehatan_fisik; relasi_sosial; kesejahteraan_psikologis; }
  }
")
```


4. Visualisasi SemPath
```{r}
semPaths(fit, 
         whatLabels = "est",  
         layout = "spring",    
         edge.label.cex = 0.8, 
         edge.color = "gray",  
         node.color = "lightblue", 
         node.width = 2,       
         fade = FALSE,         
         residuals = TRUE,     
         mar = c(6, 6, 6, 6)   
)
```


```{r}
ksksk

```
